cn.description:
===铁皮公司正版授权===

比以往任何时候都更具威胁和力量，王国保卫战5 带来了一种全新、令人兴奋的体验，以其前作的快节奏和引人入胜的玩法为基础，赢得了奖项的赞誉。

当一个强大的邪恶势力在王国上空出现时，一个意想不到的联盟形成了——发动终极塔防战役，用两支军队中最精锐的力量来保卫整个王国和领域！虽然他们暂时并肩作战，但临时联盟内部典型的纷争可能会改变后续冒险的走向。

准备好释放双英雄的强大力量，在塔防战斗中扭转战局吧！
没错，现在你可以同时控制两条龙！双倍的喷火乐趣，双倍的混乱——只要确保他们不会因为谁能囤积更多的金子争吵！

所有重量级角色如圣骑士、弓箭手、法师、死灵法师等等都听你指挥。但要注意，他们可能会开始争论谁是队伍中的真正英雄，而敌人却悄悄溜过去！ 
你准备好迎接终极对决了吗？和利尼维亚的勇敢战士们以及不屈不挠的黑暗军团，踏上征服一个巨大敌人的史诗旅程。  

游戏特色：
招募34名独特的英雄和防御塔！

- 18个精英防御塔的建造和升级
骑士顶在最前方、弓箭手百步穿杨、法师的奥术魔法、死灵法师的亡灵之力，甚至还有能召唤恶魔的深渊祭坛！——这些经典强力塔都将听从你的号令！

- 16个史诗英雄 - 将塔防战斗提升到新的水平
同时控制2名英雄去战斗！
准备见证最不可能的双英雄组合的强大威力！森林守护灵搭配钢铁傀儡？
时空法师携手“普通勇士”？看似离奇的搭档，也能爆发惊人威力！

- 6种不同地形，更有迷人的战场等你征服
保卫Kingdom Rush的多彩景观。穿越王国深林，甚至其危险的洞穴作战。

- 25个充满快节奏塔防战斗的战役阶段
在充满惊喜挑战和细节的异国地形中设定你的策略。
面对成群的不可预测的敌人和史诗般的boss战斗，将你的防御策略推向极限！

- 3种不同的游戏模式来测试你的实力
在取得胜利后，尝试以更具挑战性的方式玩每个阶段。谁不喜欢一个好的挑战呢？

- 58多个游戏成就在战斗中征服
没有诱人的奖励，史诗策略游戏算什么？展示你的技能，解锁奖励！

- 45种以上不同的敌人来测试你的塔防智慧
展现联盟的塔防战斗技能，对抗4个不同的敌人氏族。用独特的防御策略击败他们每一个！

- 当然…
有很多复活节彩蛋和Ironhide Game Studio一贯的轻松幽默。
因为没有一些隐藏的惊喜，策略游戏算什么呢？


--------

Ironhide隐私政策：https://www.ironhidegames.com/PrivacyPolicy

cn.trackName: 无尽坦克大战 - 八位元单机王者 完美模拟穿越旧经典电视手游
cn.description:
经典到不能再经典的小霸王红白机坦克, 小时候发梦也在玩. 在2012年我们为了延续儿时回忆, 开发了超级坦克大战, 很多人到现在也天天玩, 除了好玩外, 因为我们提供了500张地图. 天天玩, 玩了多年也还未玩完.

由于游戏引擎老化问题, 我们很难在超级坦克大战的基础上加入新功能. 所以我们决定开发新的坦克大战, "无尽坦克大战", 延续经典回忆.

作为经典的延续无尽坦克大战, 包含了所有经典元素, 改良了的新特点.
保证你可以玩到下一个十年.

游戏重点:
- 防御你的基地
- 摧毁所有敌方坦克
- 加入超级坦克大战500张传奇地图

无尽坦克大战, 是个跨平台游戏, 你可以在不同平台上找到它的踪影.
游戏会不定期更新, 目标是1000张地图.

cn.description:
每日英语阅读，专为英语学习者打造，精听细读助你更好学英语。软件不仅会根据你的英文水平，每天推送地道的短文和原著，更有文件导入、单词本学习等功能，等你来体验。每天十分钟，养成阅读好习惯！

【资源丰富，每日更新】
编辑精选的英语文章，只需三分钟，轻松积累实用词汇，学习地道鲜活表达；
丰富的英文读物：经典名著、短篇小说、迪士尼·皮克斯电影双语阅读、少儿读物、名人演讲......原声朗读、双语字幕，带你感受原汁原味的阅读体验；
精听党：名著原声朗读，高亮双语字幕，结合干货知识点讲义和课后习题巩固，再也不用担心名著读不懂啦。

【每日外刊，深度专业】
选自主流的英美外刊，美国本土外教纯正发音朗读；
专业英语教师逐字逐句精讲，单词、语法、发音知识一网打尽；
每天2-3道练习题和配套答案详解，助你测评当天学习效果。

【功能强大、操作便捷】
划词搜索：与《欧路词典》无缝集成，长按查词，即指即译；
播放调节：8档语速调节、4种译文切换，满足不同阶段的学习需求；
智能提示：重点单词、各大考试（四六级、考研、托福GRE雅思等）的高频词，可在文章中自动标注，单词学习更高效；
生词学习：文章中长按即可查词并加入生词本，全平台同步，更有卡片播放等复习模式助你学习；
统计图表：每天的阅读记录都会通过图表生动展示，记录你一点一滴的坚持与努力；
阅读提醒：同学，今天是不是忘记阅读了？不要紧，软件每天都可以按时提醒你。

【文件阅读，即点即查】 
您可以导入需要阅读的文献，支持PDF、ePub、Docx等多种格式
阅读时即点即查，省却查词时复制粘贴的烦恼，阅读效率大大提高
支持重点内容高亮，添加批注，随时记录你阅读时的所思所想

cn.sellerName: Xiamen Daoqimao Network Technology Co., Ltd.
cn.description:
《无处遁形：全网公敌》是Steam平台广受好评的剧情向黑客解密游戏《全网公敌》手游版本。玩家通过网络搜索和社工手段获取目标人物信息，其隐藏最深的秘密都无处遁形。游戏中的每个故事看似各自独立，但随着剧情的发展却是草蛇灰线，伏脉千里。当所有事件串联起来，竟隐藏着惊天的秘密……

希望玩家在游玩的同时，对网络本身也能产生反思，学会保护好个人隐私。

【游戏内容】
◆第一章：程序员之死
某公司CEO跳楼自杀，自称被毒妻勒索千万；而妻子却在社交网络上发布被家暴的照片。谣言满天，谁在说谎？
◆第二章：看不见的眼睛
女大学生的不雅视频在网络疯传，这一刻，她已然社会性死亡。到底谁才是始作俑者？女性的安全又该由谁去保护？
◆第三章：消失的证据
品学兼优的学生会长忽然失踪。霸凌事件使案情越发扑朔迷离。谁是凶手，谁是受害者？
◆第四章：羞辱的代价
天降巨瓜，女歌星再次被爆黑料！恐吓信、炒作、前女团成员自杀事件……网络再掀舆论狂欢！
◆第五章：永生代码
当社会陷入癫狂，你是否也愿意加入永生代码，获得真正的爱与永生？
◆DLC：甜蜜之家
一个看似甜蜜而美满的家庭背后，每个人都有各自的秘密，隐藏在背后的真相到底是什么？！
◆DLC：HelloWorld
一场离奇的车祸，让泰坦公司的高级研究员Lucrezia Borgia博士当场死亡，同行的Benjamin Engle死里逃生，但他却没有意识到自己即将卷入一场巨大的阴谋之中……

【游戏特点】
◆代入感强：在虚构的世界里，玩家扮演一名黑客，接受一家公司委托，完成一个个不同的社工事件，体验真实的黑客操作。
◆玩法多样：游戏内有多个系统，除了社工系统，还会有推理、追踪、解谜，破坏侵入等系统需要玩家们去一一攻破。
◆剧情复杂：游戏中你将面临大量的选择和谜题，而不同的选择可能将导致不同的结局。
◆人物众多：登场人物众多，每个人物都有自己的性格特点，而他们背后都有着不为人知的故事，需要作为黑客的你去一一发现事件的真相。
◆全程配音：游戏中所有出现的角色都有真人配音，让整个游戏的体验和代入感更加强烈。
◆原创音乐：多首原创主题曲以及各种音乐音效，搭配精彩剧情，享受震撼体验。

【核心功能】
◆网络搜索：玩家通过浏览器搜索功能收集目标对象的基础信息。
◆数据库：利用已知信息输入到数据库中，通过筛选后或许目标对象的其他信息。
◆破解：通过获得的目标人物信息来生成密码，用于登陆各平台的账户（包括邮箱、社交平台、聊天软件等）。
◆伪装：获取目标对象的需求、社交圈等，根据信息选择伪装，通过和目标对象接触获取更多信息。
◆聊天沟通：添加目标对象为好友后，进行聊天沟通获取信息。
◆图片分析：从图片中获取有价值的信息内容及相关线索。
当然，后期还会解锁更多的高阶社工方法！

cn.description:
《破门而入：行动小队》是一款独具特色的2D反恐战术游戏，它将策略的深度与动作的爽快感完美结合。在游戏中，你需要指挥特警小队，在错综复杂的室内环境中直面各种致命威胁。

游戏主要体验在于：

风格迥异的作战成员：6位特警队员各自拥有专属的武器、技能与升级路线，无论是正面强攻还是隐秘行动，都能找到合适的执行者。配合超过60种枪械装备，战术组合千变万化。

拒绝线性的自由挑战：84个关卡无需按部就班，你可以根据任务情况自由选择挑战顺序。面对同一场景，亦可尝试多种通关思路，游戏没有唯一的正确答案。

持续不断的新鲜体验：完成主线任务后，“无尽高塔”模式提供了极高的随机性挑战，而“僵尸入侵”模式则让你在熟悉的战场上，用全新的方式对抗成群的僵尸。

总之，如果你渴望一款能真正让自己运筹帷幄的战术游戏，本作将是绝佳选择。

hk.description:
《帕夏星球：重生》是台灣獨立遊戲團隊——藍蠍遊戲的初試啼聲之作。獨樹一格的療癒手繪場景、輕鬆的推理風格、圍繞著日常展開的遊戲主線，都將帶給玩家不同於以往的沉浸式解謎體驗。

【遊戲概要】
故事發生在遙遠的帕夏星。那裡有座位於地底的繁榮城市，住著一群可愛的汪星人。他們過著日復一日的和平生活，享受著科技帶來的便利。然而，從小在城中長大的主角波比卻時常幻想著走出封閉的地下城，去看看外頭的世界。而遊戲主線正是由此展開的。玩家將會化身波比，在看似平靜安逸，實際上卻面臨能源耗竭危機的城市裡探索，透過挑戰層層關卡，解開最終謎團，在災難來臨前找出拯救所有居民的方法！

組合強大的猴子塔和令人敬畏的英雄，打造完美防綫，擊破所有入侵的氣球！

超過十年的塔防遊戲開發經驗和定期的大規模更新讓《Bloons TD 6》成為數百萬玩家最喜愛的遊戲。現在就玩《Bloons TD 6》，享受無盡的策略遊戲樂趣！

海量內容更新！
*定期更新！ 我們每年都會發佈幾個更新，推出新的角色、功能和玩法。
*頭目活動！ 可怕的頭目氣球將挑戰最強大的防線。
*征程模式！完成由一系列地圖組成的戰鬥，通常按主題、規則和獎勵劃分。
*爭議領土！和其他玩家組成戰隊，攜手對抗五支其他戰隊，爭奪領土。奪取共同地圖上的地塊，在排行榜上展開競爭。
*任務！ 透過任務深入瞭解猴子的特點，體驗精彩劇情並分享知識。
* 獎盃商店！ 賺取獎盃即可解鎖幾十種裝飾品，並自訂猴子、氣球、動畫、音樂等等。
* 內容瀏覽器！建立你自己的挑戰和征程模式，然後與其他玩家分享，並檢視最受歡迎和玩家最多的社群內容。

史詩級猴子塔和英雄！
* 25種強力猴子塔，每一種都有三條升級路線和不同的激活技能。
* 巔峰！ 探索最新的巔峰升級所帶來的不可思議的力量。
* 17個不同的英雄，每一個都有20項標誌性的升級和2個特殊技能，另有皮膚和配音等待你去解鎖！


精彩無限！
* 4人合作！ 在公開或私人遊戲中與多達3個其他玩家一起暢玩每張地圖和每種模式。 
* 隨時隨地暢玩 – 即時沒有WiFi，也可通過單人模式享受遊戲樂趣！
* 70+張手工繪製地圖，每次更新都會新增更多地圖。
* 猴子知識！超過100項元升級，根據需要提升力量！
* 力量和即時猴子！享受透過遊戲，活動和成就獲得！ 立即提升力量，助你應對棘手的地圖和模式。



我們儘可能多地將大量內容放入每一次更新，我們會繼續通過定期更新為你帶來新的功能、內容和挑。
我們十分尊重你投入的時間和提供的支持，我們希望《Bloons TD 6》成為你玩過的最優秀的戰略遊戲。
如果遊戲未能達到你的理想，請透過https://support.ninjakiwi.com與我們聯絡，告訴我們如何改進！
那些氣球可不會乖乖束手就擒……做好戰鬥準備，開始《Bloons TD 6》吧！

hk.description:
《泰拉瑞亞》是一款經典動作遊戲元素與超高自由度創造完美結合的沙盒遊戲。玩家將從零開始，積累資源，建造家園，於2D像素畫風世界中自由馳騁。

【買斷制無內購的完整體驗】
此次發售的泰拉瑞亞， 將是完全買斷制的無內購版本，玩家在購買後將可以體驗遊戲的全內容。

Q：此次泰拉瑞亞PE版發售的版本是？
此次上線的遊戲版本是1.4.0.5，最新的1.4.3版本將在後續進行更新。由於心動版的《泰拉瑞亞》在引進之初，加入了例如【免費官方伺服器連線】【雲存檔】【語音聊天】等輔助功能，這也使得我們需要在外服PE的代碼上做額外開發，使得更新會有一定延遲。 目前植入工作已經在緊鑼密鼓的進行中，我們將在7月很快同步更新至1.4.3版本。對此給您帶來的不便，非常抱歉。如果因為版本滯後給您帶來了困擾，建議您可以先申請退款，在我們更新後再考慮入手，屆時我們也會同步開啟折扣。

Q：是否能與外服PE連線？
此次心動版的泰拉瑞亞為了給廣大移動端玩家提供更好的連線體驗，加入了官方服務器支持，而該功能需要依賴相同的遊戲版本。故我們發售的版本將不能支持與外服PE版本的私人服務器連線。如果是希望體驗更多私人服務器的版本，依舊建議大家優先考慮購買外服版本。

【遊戲特色】
對於那些新玩家們，《泰拉瑞亞》是一款總會給你不斷的驚喜的遊戲。
- 遊戲裡豐富的時間系統及天氣系統，四季與晝夜的交替，帶月荷鋤歸，說的就是你的生活。
- 玩家可通過成熟的物材合成系統，利用地圖上的資源，開始你的屠龍寶刀與金屋藏嬌的建造計劃吧！
-玩家可探索超過20個地圖，可以體驗到茂密的森林，荒蕪的沙漠，或是偶遇神秘的漂浮島，誤闖擁有童話般鮮豔明快色彩的神聖之地等等。
- 開放了300+不同的敵人和怪物，20+風格迥異的Boss，讓玩家體驗到酣暢淋漓的遊戲戰鬥系統。
- 遊戲擁有超過20名NPC可供玩家進行售賣道具、獲取治療、信息諮詢等互動：如治療玩家並幫助消除debuff的護士，出售各種機械的機械師，出售坐騎和寵物的動物學家等等。
- 遊戲內總道具數已超過3500個，玩家可通過掉落拾取、合成製作等方式獲取到建築材料、人物時裝、坐騎、稀有寶石等道具，以探索遊戲內的無限樂趣。
- 遊戲擁有極高的自由度，在這裡沒有任何需要玩家強制執行的主線或支線任務，有的只是白晝與黑夜的輪番更替。玩家不受任何人或事的限制，縱情的自由遊玩。
- 遊戲中始終充滿了輕鬆的打擊樂，富有打擊感的挖掘聲、怪物受到攻擊的聲音都讓遊戲充滿了趣味性。

人類踏足新世界，第一步需要的是勇氣，第二步需要的是朋友！

hk.description:
Wall of Insanity is a new project from the creators of the Slaughter game series.
It features a dark storyline, intense action, and a mystical journey into a dead, smoldering world.
You will face the unknown. A descent into a kingdom of anxiety and madness. The path through the abyss will be difficult, the trek extremely dangerous, and you will be left almost hopeless.


Story:

A police operation to detain a dangerous cult's sectarians leads to unexpectedly deadly consequences. That squad vanished under mysterious circumstances, and the Special Unit soldiers sent in to investigate their disappearance find just an empty, abandoned house. This is only where the story begins...



Key Features:

- Active battles with the use of firearms. Survival depends on caution, reaction speed, and weapon accuracy. Use elements of the environment itself to escape this horrific world.

- A journey to another world where fear, sorrow, and madness rule. A diligently crafted, ominous environment, fraught with mystery and danger, lies ahead of you. How far will you dare to go?

- A plethora of traps and enemies await around every corner. Investigate your surroundings carefully. Don't take unnecessary risks. Study your enemies. Carefully selected tactics will save your ammunition.  And your life.

- Explore the world to replenish and expand your arsenal. Weapons and useful items will be needed.  Look for secrets, documents, and workarounds to prevail against all odds.

- Wall of Insanity features simple controls, gamepad support, good optimization, and a wide graphics customization.

hk.description:
《無處遁形：全網公敵》是Steam平臺廣受好評的劇情向駭客解密遊戲《全網公敵》手遊版本。玩家通過網絡蒐索和社工手段獲取目標人物資訊，其隱藏最深的秘密都無處遁形。遊戲中的每個故事看似各自獨立，但隨著劇情的發展卻是草蛇灰線，伏脈千里。當所有事件串聯起來，竟隱藏著驚天的秘密……

希望玩家在遊玩的同時，對網絡本身也能產生反思，學會保護好個人隱私。

【遊戲內容】
◆第一章：程式師之死
某公司CEO跳樓自殺，自稱被毒妻勒索千萬； 而妻子卻在社交網絡上發佈被家暴的照片。 謠言滿天，誰在說謊？
◆第二章：看不見的眼睛
女大學生的不雅視頻在網絡瘋傳，這一刻，她已然社會性死亡。 到底誰才是始作俑者？ 女性的安全又該由誰去保護？
◆第三章：消失的證據
品學兼優的學生會長忽然失踪。 霸淩事件使案情越發撲朔迷離。 誰是兇手，誰是受害者？
◆第四章：羞辱的代價
天降巨瓜，女歌星再次被爆黑料！ 恐嚇信、炒作、前女團成員自殺事件……網絡再掀輿論狂歡！
◆第五章：永生代碼
當社會陷入癲狂，你是否也願意加入永生代碼，獲得真正的愛與永生？
◆DLC：甜蜜之家
一個看似甜蜜而美滿的家庭背後，每個人都有各自的秘密，隱藏在背後的真相到底是什麼？！
◆DLC：HelloWorld
一場離奇的車禍，讓泰坦公司的高級研究員Lucrezia Borgia博士當場死亡，同行的Benjamin Engle死裡逃生，但他卻沒有意識到自己即將捲入一場巨大的陰謀之中……

【遊戲特點】
◆代入感强：在虛構的世界裏，玩家扮演一名駭客，接受一家公司委託，完成一個個不同的社工事件，體驗真實的駭客操作。
◆玩法多樣：遊戲內有多個系統，除了社工系統，還會有推理、追跡、解謎，破壞侵入等系統需要玩家們去一一攻破。
◆劇情複雜：遊戲中你將面臨大量的選擇和謎題，而不同的選擇可能將導致不同的結局。
◆人物眾多：登場人物眾多，每個人物都有自己的性格特點，而他們背後都有著不為人知的故事，需要作為駭客的你去一一發現事件的真相。
◆全程配音：遊戲中所有出現的角色都有真人配音，讓整個遊戲的體驗和代入感更加强烈。
◆原創音樂：多首原創主題曲以及各種音樂音效，搭配精彩劇情，享受震撼體驗。

【覈心功能】
◆網絡蒐索：玩家通過瀏覽器搜索功能收集目標對象的基礎資訊。
◆資料庫：利用已知資訊輸入到資料庫中，通過篩選後或許目標對象的其他資訊。
◆破解：通過獲得的目標人物資訊來生成密碼，用於登入各平臺的帳戶（包括郵箱、社交平臺、聊天軟體等）。
◆偽裝：獲取目標對象的需求、社交圈等，根據資訊選擇偽裝，通過和目標對象接觸獲取更多資訊。
◆聊天溝通：添加目標對象為好友後，進行聊天溝通獲取資訊。
◆圖片分析：從圖片中獲取有價值的資訊內容及相關線索。
當然，後期還會解鎖更多的高階社工方法！

為了洗雪兩年前敗北的恥辱，混沌這次集結了異星的聯軍，以人類的罪孽為理由，再次襲擊地球。
就連一直捍衛人類的那位超級英雄，也決定倒戈相向。身為指揮官的你，要如何解決這個危機？人類和地球的明天，又會是如何？

遊戲介紹與特點
怪獸大進擊2，是我們在兩年前發售的好評作品，怪獸大進擊的續作。我們在保留一代的優點上，修改了缺點，並加入了許多新的特點和樂趣如下：
- 遊戲節奏更快速、更緊湊。
- 在原有的三種方塊外，新增資金方塊的蒐集使用。
- 秘密武器的部署不限一種，可部署複數種類在戰場上。
- 全新九種外星敵人，更聰明刁鑽的行為AI，提升挑戰性。
- 全新八種秘密武器，包含可三機分離、合體的超級機器人。

hk.description:
發現並征服整個太空深處的無限世界。揭開一個充滿挑戰與威脅的故事，它將帶領你踏上一趟跨越銀河的非凡旅程。


在太空深處沒有什麼能長久不變，和平當然也不例外！
歡迎遊玩《Iron Marines: Invasion!》

暢玩刺激新世界中的獨特關卡任務和特殊行動，每個世界都有自己的特別地形、玩法、敵人和條件。學習如何一一擊敗他們！

在諸方英雄與各種單位的協助下指揮聯邦遍及整個銀河的部隊，他們將讓你的即時戰略遊戲技巧發揮到極限。

在有趣震撼的任務中與不尋常的敵人和兇猛的外星生物作戰。規劃你的戰略來保衛銀河系的和平！

獻給所有喜歡單機即時戰略遊戲和戰略遊戲的《Iron Marines》和科幻動作遊戲粉絲。藉由帶領自己的軍隊執行刺激驚奇的任務來實現你的戰術專家使命。

入侵已經近在眉睫！
率領銀河各地最勇猛的戰鬥部隊。與聯邦最強大的海軍陸戰隊並肩作戰！

現在你可以組合你的小隊並利用每個單位的獨特戰鬥技能：從騎兵到狙擊手、機甲、導彈發射器或可怕的外星戰士部落。
訓練出驚異的英雄及其各種實用能力：從提高軍隊士氣和火力到提高他們的耐力和射程，或者在敵人攻擊你之前就能夠感知。幫助他們加入戰鬥，維護各世界的和平！

成為銀河系最大謎團的專家！
使用遊戲內的百科全書來了解你要探索的世界或辨認你面對的敵人。利用可用的戰術資訊來配置您的戰略遊戲計劃。

瞧瞧這款即時戰略太空遠征遊戲的所有驚人特色：

- 一整個銀河等你探索。
- 超過 25 個戰役任務將帶你前往許多最不可思議的世界。規劃緊密的戰略遊戲計畫，有大量的星球等你探索和防衛！
- 75+ 項特殊行動供你提升你的海洋行軍能力到巔峰水準。
- 10 大單位群組，共 24 支不同部隊。你甚至可以根據計劃要部署的任務和策略來組合後備部隊。
- 9 位各具強勁技能待你訓練的威猛英雄。幫助他們成為銀河系的佼佼者！
- 8 種特殊武器可助你在星際間揮灑軍隊戰術！設定你的遊戲計劃並利用彈跳器、毒氣炸彈甚至無人機工廠等即時武器帶來的優勢。
- 40 次升級以供提升你的戰略，並使用防禦無人機、凝固汽油彈火箭、彈跳爆破等增強你的各種單位。
- 超過 20 項成就，讓你證明你成為了一名多高明的即時戰略專家！

選擇您的難度模式以獲得最佳的即時戰略遊戲體驗：休閒、普通或老手。而且，如果你認為玩遍了整個銀河……還有不可能模式可供選擇，這僅適用於精英玩家，可離線使用！

在每日挑戰中證明自己並收集驚人的獎勵。

離線玩即時戰略遊戲：探索令人難以置信的世界，隨時隨地享受精彩的即時戰略體驗。

《Iron Marines Invasion》將在這款史詩即時戰略太空遠征中帶給你數小時豐富多采多姿的有趣遊戲，亦提供即時戰略單機遊戲。

hk.description:
自2006年首次亮相以來，《泰坦之旅》吸引了眾多玩家。在《泰坦之旅》世界中，你將在無拘無束的英雄之旅中獲得全方位的體驗！

你的光榮任務是拯救世界！

單靠諸神無法打敗泰坦，所以需要真正的英雄 - 那就是你！你的成功或失敗將決定人類和奧林匹斯山諸神的命運！與你的定制英雄一起，探索希臘、埃及、巴比倫和中國的神秘、遠古世界。征服成群的傳奇生物，掌握各種武器和武術：射箭、劍術或使用強大的魔法！

遊歷古代和北歐神話世界！

當你旅行前往派特農神廟、大金字塔、巴比倫空中花園、長城、塔耳塔洛斯競技場和其他著名景點時，與神話中的野獸戰鬥。遭遇希臘神話中的最大惡棍，探索北歐未知的土地，尋找神話中的亞特蘭蒂斯王國，然後踏上穿越地中海西部的旅程。

在你的光榮道路上，要麼全部得到，要麼一無所有！

每一個挑戰等待著你，你必須擊敗更大更強的敵人，直到達到目標並迫使泰坦屈服！與勇敢的寵物同伴一起投入戰鬥！尋找具有特殊力量的非凡物品，這些物品將增強你的能力，幫助你前進。傳奇之劍、強大的閃電咒語、魔法、弓箭以及力量超乎想像的無數其他寶藏等待著你 - 它們全都可以在你的戰鬥中使用，在可怕的生物中散佈驚駭和恐懼！

你在等什麼？

不同於其他動作角色扮演遊戲，《泰坦之旅：傳奇版》將迷人的神話世界與無盡而刺激的動作融合在一起，正如你對如此引人入勝的遊戲所期待的！

主要特點：

- 在不朽王座下載包的世界中，你將遇到希臘神話中的最大惡棍，勇敢面對地獄犬的攻擊，危害冥河的河岸。你需要解釋盲人提爾西亞斯的預言，與阿伽門農和阿喀琉斯並肩作戰，用奧德修斯的計策征服這個黑暗的新冒險。

- 在諸神黃昏下載包的北歐未知土地上，你將勇敢面對凱爾特人、諾斯曼人和阿斯加迪神靈的領地！

- 在亞特蘭蒂斯下載包，與探險家會面，尋找神話中的亞特蘭蒂斯王國。據說有一把鑰匙藏在伊拉克利翁的日記中，該日記據傳位於腓尼基城市加迪爾。踏上穿越地中海西部的旅程，包括塔耳塔洛斯競技場，進行史詩般的戰鬥！

+ 經過全面技術修改的《泰坦之旅》實施了所有的重要更新，以賦予這部經典之作最佳的遊戲體驗！

在永恆餘燼DLC可在應用內購買的 中殺死巨巫泰肯之後，英雄受到傳說中的堯帝召喚，回到東方著手對付一直肆虐 這片大陸的邪魔威脅。 在追查過程中，英雄和他的同伴們發現，遠古兇獸窮奇的現身並非只是巧合，必定有兇險萬分的陰謀正在醞釀…

+ 擁有《泰坦之旅》基本版的所有玩家請注意：這裡提到的下載包還將作為附加內容發佈以供購買，以便所有粉絲可以升級他們的遊戲以充分享受所有擴展！

hk.description:
*在玩《Subnautica》之前，記得先確認你的裝置是否支援！*

《Subnautica》是一款設定在外星海洋星球上的水下冒險遊戲。這個龐大又充滿驚奇和危險的開放世界，等你來探索！

潛入深海、製作裝備、駕駛潛艇，並巧妙應對野生生物，探索茂密的珊瑚礁、火山、洞穴系統等多樣環境——同時努力生存下去。揭開這個充滿生物世界的神祕面紗，這些生物有的親近友好，有的則充滿敵意，且到處散落著過去的線索。

在生存模式下挑戰自我，或切換到自由模式或創意模式，無需擔心水、食物或氧氣的壓力，輕鬆探索這顆海洋星球。

特色
• 求生——在廣大的水下星球迫降後，時間緊迫，必須尋找水和食物，並開發裝備來探索這個世界。
• 探索——在潛入高聳的海帶森林、陽光照耀的高原、生物發光的珊瑚礁和蜿蜒的洞穴系統時，管理你的飢餓、口渴和氧氣供應。
• 搜刮——收集周圍海洋中的資源。深入探險以找到更稀有的資源，讓你能夠製作更先進的物品。
• 製作——建造基地供你避難，製造載具供你駕駛，製作生存工具幫助你在這個水下世界中導航和適應。
• 發現——這個星球發生了什麼事？是什麼導致你墜毀？你能找到方法活著離開這個星球嗎？
• 自訂——在生存模式下挑戰自我，或切換到自由模式或創意模式，無需擔心水、食物或氧氣的壓力，輕鬆探索這顆海洋星球。

精心為行動裝置重新設計
• 全新介面：專為行動裝置設計的獨家 UI，完全支援觸控操作
• Game Center 成就系統
• 雲端存檔：在 iOS 裝置間同步遊戲進度
• 支援 MFi 控制器
• 最佳化支援 iPhone 16（包括 Pro Max）

-----

*不支援的裝置 (遊戲無法運作)*：
- iPhone Xr, iPhone SE Gen 2 (2020)
- iPad Mini Gen 5, iPad Air Gen 3, iPad Gen 8, iPad Gen 9

*僅支援低解析度的裝置*：
- iPhone Xs, iPhone Xs Max, iPhone 11, iPhone 11 Pro, iPhone 11 Pro Max, iPhone 12, iPhone 12 Mini, iPhone 13, iPhone 13 Mini, iPhone SE Gen 3 (2022) 
- iPad Pro 10.5"", iPad Mini Gen 6, iPad Air Gen 4, iPad Gen 10, iPad Pro 11"" Gen 1, iPad Pro 12.9"" Gen 3

*完全支援的裝置*：
- iPhone 12 Pro, iPhone 12 Pro Max, iPhone 13 Pro, iPhone 13 Pro Max, iPhone 14 及以上  
- iPad Pro 11"" Gen 2, iPad Pro 12.9"" Gen 4, iPad Air Gen 5, iPad Pro 11"" Gen 3, iPad Pro 11"" Gen 4, iPad Pro 12.9"" Gen 5, iPad Pro 12.9"" Gen 6 及以上

組合強大的猴子塔和令人敬畏的英雄，打造完美防綫，擊破所有入侵的氣球！

超過十年的塔防遊戲開發經驗和定期的大規模更新讓《Bloons TD 6》成為數百萬玩家最喜愛的遊戲。現在就玩《Bloons TD 6》，享受無盡的策略遊戲樂趣！

海量內容更新！

*任務！ 透過任務深入瞭解猴子的特點，體驗精彩劇情並分享知識。
* 獎盃商店！ 賺取獎盃即可解鎖幾十種裝飾品，並自訂猴子、氣球、動畫、音樂等等。
* 內容瀏覽器！建立你自己的挑戰和征程模式，然後與其他玩家分享，並檢視最受歡迎和玩家最多的社群內容。

史詩級猴子塔和英雄！

* 巔峰！ 探索最新的巔峰升級所帶來的不可思議的力量。
* 17個不同的英雄，每一個都有20項標誌性的升級和2個特殊技能，另有皮膚和配音等待你去解鎖！


精彩無限！

* 隨時隨地暢玩 – 即時沒有WiFi，也可通過單人模式享受遊戲樂趣！
* 70+張手工繪製地圖，每次更新都會新增更多地圖。
* 猴子知識！超過100項元升級，根據需要提升力量！
* 力量和即時猴子！享受透過遊戲，活動和成就獲得！ 立即提升力量，助你應對棘手的地圖和模式。



我們儘可能多地將大量內容放入每一次更新，我們會繼續通過定期更新為你帶來新的功能、內容和挑。
我們十分尊重你投入的時間和提供的支持，我們希望《Bloons TD 6》成為你玩過的最優秀的戰略遊戲。

mo.description:
《泰拉瑞亞》是一款經典動作遊戲元素與超高自由度創造完美結合的沙盒遊戲。玩家將從零開始，積累資源，建造家園，於2D像素畫風世界中自由馳騁。

【買斷制無內購的完整體驗】
此次發售的泰拉瑞亞， 將是完全買斷制的無內購版本，玩家在購買後將可以體驗遊戲的全內容。

Q：此次泰拉瑞亞PE版發售的版本是？
此次上線的遊戲版本是1.4.0.5，最新的1.4.3版本將在後續進行更新。由於心動版的《泰拉瑞亞》在引進之初，加入了例如【免費官方伺服器連線】【雲存檔】【語音聊天】等輔助功能，這也使得我們需要在外服PE的代碼上做額外開發，使得更新會有一定延遲。 目前植入工作已經在緊鑼密鼓的進行中，我們將在7月很快同步更新至1.4.3版本。對此給您帶來的不便，非常抱歉。如果因為版本滯後給您帶來了困擾，建議您可以先申請退款，在我們更新後再考慮入手，屆時我們也會同步開啟折扣。

Q：是否能與外服PE連線？
此次心動版的泰拉瑞亞為了給廣大移動端玩家提供更好的連線體驗，加入了官方服務器支持，而該功能需要依賴相同的遊戲版本。故我們發售的版本將不能支持與外服PE版本的私人服務器連線。如果是希望體驗更多私人服務器的版本，依舊建議大家優先考慮購買外服版本。

【遊戲特色】
對於那些新玩家們，《泰拉瑞亞》是一款總會給你不斷的驚喜的遊戲。
- 遊戲裡豐富的時間系統及天氣系統，四季與晝夜的交替，帶月荷鋤歸，說的就是你的生活。
- 玩家可通過成熟的物材合成系統，利用地圖上的資源，開始你的屠龍寶刀與金屋藏嬌的建造計劃吧！
-玩家可探索超過20個地圖，可以體驗到茂密的森林，荒蕪的沙漠，或是偶遇神秘的漂浮島，誤闖擁有童話般鮮豔明快色彩的神聖之地等等。
- 開放了300+不同的敵人和怪物，20+風格迥異的Boss，讓玩家體驗到酣暢淋漓的遊戲戰鬥系統。
- 遊戲擁有超過20名NPC可供玩家進行售賣道具、獲取治療、信息諮詢等互動：如治療玩家並幫助消除debuff的護士，出售各種機械的機械師，出售坐騎和寵物的動物學家等等。
- 遊戲內總道具數已超過3500個，玩家可通過掉落拾取、合成製作等方式獲取到建築材料、人物時裝、坐騎、稀有寶石等道具，以探索遊戲內的無限樂趣。
- 遊戲擁有極高的自由度，在這裡沒有任何需要玩家強制執行的主線或支線任務，有的只是白晝與黑夜的輪番更替。玩家不受任何人或事的限制，縱情的自由遊玩。
- 遊戲中始終充滿了輕鬆的打擊樂，富有打擊感的挖掘聲、怪物受到攻擊的聲音都讓遊戲充滿了趣味性。

人類踏足新世界，第一步需要的是勇氣，第二步需要的是朋友！

mo.description:
Wall of Insanity is a new project from the creators of the Slaughter game series.
It features a dark storyline, intense action, and a mystical journey into a dead, smoldering world.
You will face the unknown. A descent into a kingdom of anxiety and madness. The path through the abyss will be difficult, the trek extremely dangerous, and you will be left almost hopeless.


Story:

A police operation to detain a dangerous cult's sectarians leads to unexpectedly deadly consequences. That squad vanished under mysterious circumstances, and the Special Unit soldiers sent in to investigate their disappearance find just an empty, abandoned house. This is only where the story begins...



Key Features:

- Active battles with the use of firearms. Survival depends on caution, reaction speed, and weapon accuracy. Use elements of the environment itself to escape this horrific world.

- A journey to another world where fear, sorrow, and madness rule. A diligently crafted, ominous environment, fraught with mystery and danger, lies ahead of you. How far will you dare to go?

- A plethora of traps and enemies await around every corner. Investigate your surroundings carefully. Don't take unnecessary risks. Study your enemies. Carefully selected tactics will save your ammunition.  And your life.

- Explore the world to replenish and expand your arsenal. Weapons and useful items will be needed.  Look for secrets, documents, and workarounds to prevail against all odds.

- Wall of Insanity features simple controls, gamepad support, good optimization, and a wide graphics customization.

mo.description:
《無處遁形：全網公敵》是Steam平臺廣受好評的劇情向駭客解密遊戲《全網公敵》手遊版本。玩家通過網絡蒐索和社工手段獲取目標人物資訊，其隱藏最深的秘密都無處遁形。遊戲中的每個故事看似各自獨立，但隨著劇情的發展卻是草蛇灰線，伏脈千里。當所有事件串聯起來，竟隱藏著驚天的秘密……

希望玩家在遊玩的同時，對網絡本身也能產生反思，學會保護好個人隱私。

【遊戲內容】
◆第一章：程式師之死
某公司CEO跳樓自殺，自稱被毒妻勒索千萬； 而妻子卻在社交網絡上發佈被家暴的照片。 謠言滿天，誰在說謊？
◆第二章：看不見的眼睛
女大學生的不雅視頻在網絡瘋傳，這一刻，她已然社會性死亡。 到底誰才是始作俑者？ 女性的安全又該由誰去保護？
◆第三章：消失的證據
品學兼優的學生會長忽然失踪。 霸淩事件使案情越發撲朔迷離。 誰是兇手，誰是受害者？
◆第四章：羞辱的代價
天降巨瓜，女歌星再次被爆黑料！ 恐嚇信、炒作、前女團成員自殺事件……網絡再掀輿論狂歡！
◆第五章：永生代碼
當社會陷入癲狂，你是否也願意加入永生代碼，獲得真正的愛與永生？
◆DLC：甜蜜之家
一個看似甜蜜而美滿的家庭背後，每個人都有各自的秘密，隱藏在背後的真相到底是什麼？！
◆DLC：HelloWorld
一場離奇的車禍，讓泰坦公司的高級研究員Lucrezia Borgia博士當場死亡，同行的Benjamin Engle死裡逃生，但他卻沒有意識到自己即將捲入一場巨大的陰謀之中……

【遊戲特點】
◆代入感强：在虛構的世界裏，玩家扮演一名駭客，接受一家公司委託，完成一個個不同的社工事件，體驗真實的駭客操作。
◆玩法多樣：遊戲內有多個系統，除了社工系統，還會有推理、追跡、解謎，破壞侵入等系統需要玩家們去一一攻破。
◆劇情複雜：遊戲中你將面臨大量的選擇和謎題，而不同的選擇可能將導致不同的結局。
◆人物眾多：登場人物眾多，每個人物都有自己的性格特點，而他們背後都有著不為人知的故事，需要作為駭客的你去一一發現事件的真相。
◆全程配音：遊戲中所有出現的角色都有真人配音，讓整個遊戲的體驗和代入感更加强烈。
◆原創音樂：多首原創主題曲以及各種音樂音效，搭配精彩劇情，享受震撼體驗。

【覈心功能】
◆網絡蒐索：玩家通過瀏覽器搜索功能收集目標對象的基礎資訊。
◆資料庫：利用已知資訊輸入到資料庫中，通過篩選後或許目標對象的其他資訊。
◆破解：通過獲得的目標人物資訊來生成密碼，用於登入各平臺的帳戶（包括郵箱、社交平臺、聊天軟體等）。
◆偽裝：獲取目標對象的需求、社交圈等，根據資訊選擇偽裝，通過和目標對象接觸獲取更多資訊。
◆聊天溝通：添加目標對象為好友後，進行聊天溝通獲取資訊。
◆圖片分析：從圖片中獲取有價值的資訊內容及相關線索。
當然，後期還會解鎖更多的高階社工方法！

為了洗雪兩年前敗北的恥辱，混沌這次集結了異星的聯軍，以人類的罪孽為理由，再次襲擊地球。
就連一直捍衛人類的那位超級英雄，也決定倒戈相向。身為指揮官的你，要如何解決這個危機？人類和地球的明天，又會是如何？

遊戲介紹與特點
怪獸大進擊2，是我們在兩年前發售的好評作品，怪獸大進擊的續作。我們在保留一代的優點上，修改了缺點，並加入了許多新的特點和樂趣如下：
- 遊戲節奏更快速、更緊湊。
- 在原有的三種方塊外，新增資金方塊的蒐集使用。
- 秘密武器的部署不限一種，可部署複數種類在戰場上。
- 全新九種外星敵人，更聰明刁鑽的行為AI，提升挑戰性。
- 全新八種秘密武器，包含可三機分離、合體的超級機器人。

mo.description:
發現並征服整個太空深處的無限世界。揭開一個充滿挑戰與威脅的故事，它將帶領你踏上一趟跨越銀河的非凡旅程。


在太空深處沒有什麼能長久不變，和平當然也不例外！
歡迎遊玩《Iron Marines: Invasion!》

暢玩刺激新世界中的獨特關卡任務和特殊行動，每個世界都有自己的特別地形、玩法、敵人和條件。學習如何一一擊敗他們！

在諸方英雄與各種單位的協助下指揮聯邦遍及整個銀河的部隊，他們將讓你的即時戰略遊戲技巧發揮到極限。

在有趣震撼的任務中與不尋常的敵人和兇猛的外星生物作戰。規劃你的戰略來保衛銀河系的和平！

獻給所有喜歡單機即時戰略遊戲和戰略遊戲的《Iron Marines》和科幻動作遊戲粉絲。藉由帶領自己的軍隊執行刺激驚奇的任務來實現你的戰術專家使命。

入侵已經近在眉睫！
率領銀河各地最勇猛的戰鬥部隊。與聯邦最強大的海軍陸戰隊並肩作戰！

現在你可以組合你的小隊並利用每個單位的獨特戰鬥技能：從騎兵到狙擊手、機甲、導彈發射器或可怕的外星戰士部落。
訓練出驚異的英雄及其各種實用能力：從提高軍隊士氣和火力到提高他們的耐力和射程，或者在敵人攻擊你之前就能夠感知。幫助他們加入戰鬥，維護各世界的和平！

成為銀河系最大謎團的專家！
使用遊戲內的百科全書來了解你要探索的世界或辨認你面對的敵人。利用可用的戰術資訊來配置您的戰略遊戲計劃。

瞧瞧這款即時戰略太空遠征遊戲的所有驚人特色：

- 一整個銀河等你探索。
- 超過 25 個戰役任務將帶你前往許多最不可思議的世界。規劃緊密的戰略遊戲計畫，有大量的星球等你探索和防衛！
- 75+ 項特殊行動供你提升你的海洋行軍能力到巔峰水準。
- 10 大單位群組，共 24 支不同部隊。你甚至可以根據計劃要部署的任務和策略來組合後備部隊。
- 9 位各具強勁技能待你訓練的威猛英雄。幫助他們成為銀河系的佼佼者！
- 8 種特殊武器可助你在星際間揮灑軍隊戰術！設定你的遊戲計劃並利用彈跳器、毒氣炸彈甚至無人機工廠等即時武器帶來的優勢。
- 40 次升級以供提升你的戰略，並使用防禦無人機、凝固汽油彈火箭、彈跳爆破等增強你的各種單位。
- 超過 20 項成就，讓你證明你成為了一名多高明的即時戰略專家！

選擇您的難度模式以獲得最佳的即時戰略遊戲體驗：休閒、普通或老手。而且，如果你認為玩遍了整個銀河……還有不可能模式可供選擇，這僅適用於精英玩家，可離線使用！

在每日挑戰中證明自己並收集驚人的獎勵。

離線玩即時戰略遊戲：探索令人難以置信的世界，隨時隨地享受精彩的即時戰略體驗。

《Iron Marines Invasion》將在這款史詩即時戰略太空遠征中帶給你數小時豐富多采多姿的有趣遊戲，亦提供即時戰略單機遊戲。

mo.description:
自2006年首次亮相以來，《泰坦之旅》吸引了眾多玩家。在《泰坦之旅》世界中，你將在無拘無束的英雄之旅中獲得全方位的體驗！

你的光榮任務是拯救世界！

單靠諸神無法打敗泰坦，所以需要真正的英雄 - 那就是你！你的成功或失敗將決定人類和奧林匹斯山諸神的命運！與你的定制英雄一起，探索希臘、埃及、巴比倫和中國的神秘、遠古世界。征服成群的傳奇生物，掌握各種武器和武術：射箭、劍術或使用強大的魔法！

遊歷古代和北歐神話世界！

當你旅行前往派特農神廟、大金字塔、巴比倫空中花園、長城、塔耳塔洛斯競技場和其他著名景點時，與神話中的野獸戰鬥。遭遇希臘神話中的最大惡棍，探索北歐未知的土地，尋找神話中的亞特蘭蒂斯王國，然後踏上穿越地中海西部的旅程。

在你的光榮道路上，要麼全部得到，要麼一無所有！

每一個挑戰等待著你，你必須擊敗更大更強的敵人，直到達到目標並迫使泰坦屈服！與勇敢的寵物同伴一起投入戰鬥！尋找具有特殊力量的非凡物品，這些物品將增強你的能力，幫助你前進。傳奇之劍、強大的閃電咒語、魔法、弓箭以及力量超乎想像的無數其他寶藏等待著你 - 它們全都可以在你的戰鬥中使用，在可怕的生物中散佈驚駭和恐懼！

你在等什麼？

不同於其他動作角色扮演遊戲，《泰坦之旅：傳奇版》將迷人的神話世界與無盡而刺激的動作融合在一起，正如你對如此引人入勝的遊戲所期待的！

主要特點：

- 在不朽王座下載包的世界中，你將遇到希臘神話中的最大惡棍，勇敢面對地獄犬的攻擊，危害冥河的河岸。你需要解釋盲人提爾西亞斯的預言，與阿伽門農和阿喀琉斯並肩作戰，用奧德修斯的計策征服這個黑暗的新冒險。

- 在諸神黃昏下載包的北歐未知土地上，你將勇敢面對凱爾特人、諾斯曼人和阿斯加迪神靈的領地！

- 在亞特蘭蒂斯下載包，與探險家會面，尋找神話中的亞特蘭蒂斯王國。據說有一把鑰匙藏在伊拉克利翁的日記中，該日記據傳位於腓尼基城市加迪爾。踏上穿越地中海西部的旅程，包括塔耳塔洛斯競技場，進行史詩般的戰鬥！

+ 經過全面技術修改的《泰坦之旅》實施了所有的重要更新，以賦予這部經典之作最佳的遊戲體驗！

在永恆餘燼DLC可在應用內購買的 中殺死巨巫泰肯之後，英雄受到傳說中的堯帝召喚，回到東方著手對付一直肆虐 這片大陸的邪魔威脅。 在追查過程中，英雄和他的同伴們發現，遠古兇獸窮奇的現身並非只是巧合，必定有兇險萬分的陰謀正在醞釀…

+ 擁有《泰坦之旅》基本版的所有玩家請注意：這裡提到的下載包還將作為附加內容發佈以供購買，以便所有粉絲可以升級他們的遊戲以充分享受所有擴展！

mo.description:
*在玩《Subnautica》之前，記得先確認你的裝置是否支援！*

《Subnautica》是一款設定在外星海洋星球上的水下冒險遊戲。這個龐大又充滿驚奇和危險的開放世界，等你來探索！

潛入深海、製作裝備、駕駛潛艇，並巧妙應對野生生物，探索茂密的珊瑚礁、火山、洞穴系統等多樣環境——同時努力生存下去。揭開這個充滿生物世界的神祕面紗，這些生物有的親近友好，有的則充滿敵意，且到處散落著過去的線索。

在生存模式下挑戰自我，或切換到自由模式或創意模式，無需擔心水、食物或氧氣的壓力，輕鬆探索這顆海洋星球。

特色
• 求生——在廣大的水下星球迫降後，時間緊迫，必須尋找水和食物，並開發裝備來探索這個世界。
• 探索——在潛入高聳的海帶森林、陽光照耀的高原、生物發光的珊瑚礁和蜿蜒的洞穴系統時，管理你的飢餓、口渴和氧氣供應。
• 搜刮——收集周圍海洋中的資源。深入探險以找到更稀有的資源，讓你能夠製作更先進的物品。
• 製作——建造基地供你避難，製造載具供你駕駛，製作生存工具幫助你在這個水下世界中導航和適應。
• 發現——這個星球發生了什麼事？是什麼導致你墜毀？你能找到方法活著離開這個星球嗎？

tw.description:
《泰拉瑞亞》是一款經典動作遊戲元素與超高自由度創造完美結合的沙盒遊戲。玩家將從零開始，積累資源，建造家園，於2D像素畫風世界中自由馳騁。

【買斷制無內購的完整體驗】
此次發售的泰拉瑞亞， 將是完全買斷制的無內購版本，玩家在購買後將可以體驗遊戲的全內容。

Q：此次泰拉瑞亞PE版發售的版本是？
此次上線的遊戲版本是1.4.0.5，最新的1.4.3版本將在後續進行更新。由於心動版的《泰拉瑞亞》在引進之初，加入了例如【免費官方伺服器連線】【雲存檔】【語音聊天】等輔助功能，這也使得我們需要在外服PE的代碼上做額外開發，使得更新會有一定延遲。 目前植入工作已經在緊鑼密鼓的進行中，我們將在7月很快同步更新至1.4.3版本。對此給您帶來的不便，非常抱歉。如果因為版本滯後給您帶來了困擾，建議您可以先申請退款，在我們更新後再考慮入手，屆時我們也會同步開啟折扣。

Q：是否能與外服PE連線？
此次心動版的泰拉瑞亞為了給廣大移動端玩家提供更好的連線體驗，加入了官方服務器支持，而該功能需要依賴相同的遊戲版本。故我們發售的版本將不能支持與外服PE版本的私人服務器連線。如果是希望體驗更多私人服務器的版本，依舊建議大家優先考慮購買外服版本。

【遊戲特色】
對於那些新玩家們，《泰拉瑞亞》是一款總會給你不斷的驚喜的遊戲。
- 遊戲裡豐富的時間系統及天氣系統，四季與晝夜的交替，帶月荷鋤歸，說的就是你的生活。
- 玩家可通過成熟的物材合成系統，利用地圖上的資源，開始你的屠龍寶刀與金屋藏嬌的建造計劃吧！
-玩家可探索超過20個地圖，可以體驗到茂密的森林，荒蕪的沙漠，或是偶遇神秘的漂浮島，誤闖擁有童話般鮮豔明快色彩的神聖之地等等。
- 開放了300+不同的敵人和怪物，20+風格迥異的Boss，讓玩家體驗到酣暢淋漓的遊戲戰鬥系統。
- 遊戲擁有超過20名NPC可供玩家進行售賣道具、獲取治療、信息諮詢等互動：如治療玩家並幫助消除debuff的護士，出售各種機械的機械師，出售坐騎和寵物的動物學家等等。
- 遊戲內總道具數已超過3500個，玩家可通過掉落拾取、合成製作等方式獲取到建築材料、人物時裝、坐騎、稀有寶石等道具，以探索遊戲內的無限樂趣。
- 遊戲擁有極高的自由度，在這裡沒有任何需要玩家強制執行的主線或支線任務，有的只是白晝與黑夜的輪番更替。玩家不受任何人或事的限制，縱情的自由遊玩。
- 遊戲中始終充滿了輕鬆的打擊樂，富有打擊感的挖掘聲、怪物受到攻擊的聲音都讓遊戲充滿了趣味性。

人類踏足新世界，第一步需要的是勇氣，第二步需要的是朋友！

通过我们直观的界面和极简设计，您可以轻松浏览各个元素。每个元素在引人入胜的3D环境中栩栩如生，让您以前所未有的方式可视化其结构。观察元素如何相互作用，以全新的视角揭示它们的性质。

想要了解特定元素更多吗？我们的应用提供有关每个元素的详细且易于理解的信息，涵盖从其物理和化学性质到历史和实际用途的所有方面。学习元素周期表从未如此易于获取和令人兴奋。

我们的应用非常适合学生、专业人士和科学爱好者。无论您是学习化学还是只是对元素世界感到好奇，我们的3D应用都提供了一种教育性和富有娱乐性的体验。

立即下载，沉浸在元素周期表之美中，以前所未有的方式探索、学习并着迷！

tw.description:
Wall of Insanity is a new project from the creators of the Slaughter game series.
It features a dark storyline, intense action, and a mystical journey into a dead, smoldering world.
You will face the unknown. A descent into a kingdom of anxiety and madness. The path through the abyss will be difficult, the trek extremely dangerous, and you will be left almost hopeless.


Story:

A police operation to detain a dangerous cult's sectarians leads to unexpectedly deadly consequences. That squad vanished under mysterious circumstances, and the Special Unit soldiers sent in to investigate their disappearance find just an empty, abandoned house. This is only where the story begins...



Key Features:

- Active battles with the use of firearms. Survival depends on caution, reaction speed, and weapon accuracy. Use elements of the environment itself to escape this horrific world.

- A journey to another world where fear, sorrow, and madness rule. A diligently crafted, ominous environment, fraught with mystery and danger, lies ahead of you. How far will you dare to go?

- A plethora of traps and enemies await around every corner. Investigate your surroundings carefully. Don't take unnecessary risks. Study your enemies. Carefully selected tactics will save your ammunition.  And your life.

- Explore the world to replenish and expand your arsenal. Weapons and useful items will be needed.  Look for secrets, documents, and workarounds to prevail against all odds.

- Wall of Insanity features simple controls, gamepad support, good optimization, and a wide graphics customization.

tw.description:
《無處遁形：全網公敵》是Steam平臺廣受好評的劇情向駭客解密遊戲《全網公敵》手遊版本。玩家通過網絡蒐索和社工手段獲取目標人物資訊，其隱藏最深的秘密都無處遁形。遊戲中的每個故事看似各自獨立，但隨著劇情的發展卻是草蛇灰線，伏脈千里。當所有事件串聯起來，竟隱藏著驚天的秘密……

希望玩家在遊玩的同時，對網絡本身也能產生反思，學會保護好個人隱私。

【遊戲內容】
◆第一章：程式師之死
某公司CEO跳樓自殺，自稱被毒妻勒索千萬； 而妻子卻在社交網絡上發佈被家暴的照片。 謠言滿天，誰在說謊？
◆第二章：看不見的眼睛
女大學生的不雅視頻在網絡瘋傳，這一刻，她已然社會性死亡。 到底誰才是始作俑者？ 女性的安全又該由誰去保護？
◆第三章：消失的證據
品學兼優的學生會長忽然失踪。 霸淩事件使案情越發撲朔迷離。 誰是兇手，誰是受害者？
◆第四章：羞辱的代價
天降巨瓜，女歌星再次被爆黑料！ 恐嚇信、炒作、前女團成員自殺事件……網絡再掀輿論狂歡！
◆第五章：永生代碼
當社會陷入癲狂，你是否也願意加入永生代碼，獲得真正的愛與永生？
◆DLC：甜蜜之家
一個看似甜蜜而美滿的家庭背後，每個人都有各自的秘密，隱藏在背後的真相到底是什麼？！
◆DLC：HelloWorld
一場離奇的車禍，讓泰坦公司的高級研究員Lucrezia Borgia博士當場死亡，同行的Benjamin Engle死裡逃生，但他卻沒有意識到自己即將捲入一場巨大的陰謀之中……

【遊戲特點】
◆代入感强：在虛構的世界裏，玩家扮演一名駭客，接受一家公司委託，完成一個個不同的社工事件，體驗真實的駭客操作。
◆玩法多樣：遊戲內有多個系統，除了社工系統，還會有推理、追跡、解謎，破壞侵入等系統需要玩家們去一一攻破。
◆劇情複雜：遊戲中你將面臨大量的選擇和謎題，而不同的選擇可能將導致不同的結局。
◆人物眾多：登場人物眾多，每個人物都有自己的性格特點，而他們背後都有著不為人知的故事，需要作為駭客的你去一一發現事件的真相。
◆全程配音：遊戲中所有出現的角色都有真人配音，讓整個遊戲的體驗和代入感更加强烈。
◆原創音樂：多首原創主題曲以及各種音樂音效，搭配精彩劇情，享受震撼體驗。

【覈心功能】
◆網絡蒐索：玩家通過瀏覽器搜索功能收集目標對象的基礎資訊。
◆資料庫：利用已知資訊輸入到資料庫中，通過篩選後或許目標對象的其他資訊。
◆破解：通過獲得的目標人物資訊來生成密碼，用於登入各平臺的帳戶（包括郵箱、社交平臺、聊天軟體等）。
◆偽裝：獲取目標對象的需求、社交圈等，根據資訊選擇偽裝，通過和目標對象接觸獲取更多資訊。
◆聊天溝通：添加目標對象為好友後，進行聊天溝通獲取資訊。
◆圖片分析：從圖片中獲取有價值的資訊內容及相關線索。
當然，後期還會解鎖更多的高階社工方法！

為了洗雪兩年前敗北的恥辱，混沌這次集結了異星的聯軍，以人類的罪孽為理由，再次襲擊地球。
就連一直捍衛人類的那位超級英雄，也決定倒戈相向。身為指揮官的你，要如何解決這個危機？人類和地球的明天，又會是如何？

遊戲介紹與特點
怪獸大進擊2，是我們在兩年前發售的好評作品，怪獸大進擊的續作。我們在保留一代的優點上，修改了缺點，並加入了許多新的特點和樂趣如下：
- 遊戲節奏更快速、更緊湊。
- 在原有的三種方塊外，新增資金方塊的蒐集使用。
- 秘密武器的部署不限一種，可部署複數種類在戰場上。
- 全新九種外星敵人，更聰明刁鑽的行為AI，提升挑戰性。
- 全新八種秘密武器，包含可三機分離、合體的超級機器人。

tw.description:
發現並征服整個太空深處的無限世界。揭開一個充滿挑戰與威脅的故事，它將帶領你踏上一趟跨越銀河的非凡旅程。


在太空深處沒有什麼能長久不變，和平當然也不例外！
歡迎遊玩《Iron Marines: Invasion!》

暢玩刺激新世界中的獨特關卡任務和特殊行動，每個世界都有自己的特別地形、玩法、敵人和條件。學習如何一一擊敗他們！

在諸方英雄與各種單位的協助下指揮聯邦遍及整個銀河的部隊，他們將讓你的即時戰略遊戲技巧發揮到極限。

在有趣震撼的任務中與不尋常的敵人和兇猛的外星生物作戰。規劃你的戰略來保衛銀河系的和平！

獻給所有喜歡單機即時戰略遊戲和戰略遊戲的《Iron Marines》和科幻動作遊戲粉絲。藉由帶領自己的軍隊執行刺激驚奇的任務來實現你的戰術專家使命。

入侵已經近在眉睫！
率領銀河各地最勇猛的戰鬥部隊。與聯邦最強大的海軍陸戰隊並肩作戰！

現在你可以組合你的小隊並利用每個單位的獨特戰鬥技能：從騎兵到狙擊手、機甲、導彈發射器或可怕的外星戰士部落。
訓練出驚異的英雄及其各種實用能力：從提高軍隊士氣和火力到提高他們的耐力和射程，或者在敵人攻擊你之前就能夠感知。幫助他們加入戰鬥，維護各世界的和平！

成為銀河系最大謎團的專家！
使用遊戲內的百科全書來了解你要探索的世界或辨認你面對的敵人。利用可用的戰術資訊來配置您的戰略遊戲計劃。

瞧瞧這款即時戰略太空遠征遊戲的所有驚人特色：

- 一整個銀河等你探索。
- 超過 25 個戰役任務將帶你前往許多最不可思議的世界。規劃緊密的戰略遊戲計畫，有大量的星球等你探索和防衛！
- 75+ 項特殊行動供你提升你的海洋行軍能力到巔峰水準。
- 10 大單位群組，共 24 支不同部隊。你甚至可以根據計劃要部署的任務和策略來組合後備部隊。
- 9 位各具強勁技能待你訓練的威猛英雄。幫助他們成為銀河系的佼佼者！
- 8 種特殊武器可助你在星際間揮灑軍隊戰術！設定你的遊戲計劃並利用彈跳器、毒氣炸彈甚至無人機工廠等即時武器帶來的優勢。
- 40 次升級以供提升你的戰略，並使用防禦無人機、凝固汽油彈火箭、彈跳爆破等增強你的各種單位。
- 超過 20 項成就，讓你證明你成為了一名多高明的即時戰略專家！

選擇您的難度模式以獲得最佳的即時戰略遊戲體驗：休閒、普通或老手。而且，如果你認為玩遍了整個銀河……還有不可能模式可供選擇，這僅適用於精英玩家，可離線使用！

在每日挑戰中證明自己並收集驚人的獎勵。

離線玩即時戰略遊戲：探索令人難以置信的世界，隨時隨地享受精彩的即時戰略體驗。

《Iron Marines Invasion》將在這款史詩即時戰略太空遠征中帶給你數小時豐富多采多姿的有趣遊戲，亦提供即時戰略單機遊戲。

tw.description:
自2006年首次亮相以來，《泰坦之旅》吸引了眾多玩家。在《泰坦之旅》世界中，你將在無拘無束的英雄之旅中獲得全方位的體驗！

你的光榮任務是拯救世界！

單靠諸神無法打敗泰坦，所以需要真正的英雄 - 那就是你！你的成功或失敗將決定人類和奧林匹斯山諸神的命運！與你的定制英雄一起，探索希臘、埃及、巴比倫和中國的神秘、遠古世界。征服成群的傳奇生物，掌握各種武器和武術：射箭、劍術或使用強大的魔法！

遊歷古代和北歐神話世界！

當你旅行前往派特農神廟、大金字塔、巴比倫空中花園、長城、塔耳塔洛斯競技場和其他著名景點時，與神話中的野獸戰鬥。遭遇希臘神話中的最大惡棍，探索北歐未知的土地，尋找神話中的亞特蘭蒂斯王國，然後踏上穿越地中海西部的旅程。

在你的光榮道路上，要麼全部得到，要麼一無所有！

每一個挑戰等待著你，你必須擊敗更大更強的敵人，直到達到目標並迫使泰坦屈服！與勇敢的寵物同伴一起投入戰鬥！尋找具有特殊力量的非凡物品，這些物品將增強你的能力，幫助你前進。傳奇之劍、強大的閃電咒語、魔法、弓箭以及力量超乎想像的無數其他寶藏等待著你 - 它們全都可以在你的戰鬥中使用，在可怕的生物中散佈驚駭和恐懼！

你在等什麼？

不同於其他動作角色扮演遊戲，《泰坦之旅：傳奇版》將迷人的神話世界與無盡而刺激的動作融合在一起，正如你對如此引人入勝的遊戲所期待的！

主要特點：

- 在不朽王座下載包的世界中，你將遇到希臘神話中的最大惡棍，勇敢面對地獄犬的攻擊，危害冥河的河岸。你需要解釋盲人提爾西亞斯的預言，與阿伽門農和阿喀琉斯並肩作戰，用奧德修斯的計策征服這個黑暗的新冒險。

- 在諸神黃昏下載包的北歐未知土地上，你將勇敢面對凱爾特人、諾斯曼人和阿斯加迪神靈的領地！

- 在亞特蘭蒂斯下載包，與探險家會面，尋找神話中的亞特蘭蒂斯王國。據說有一把鑰匙藏在伊拉克利翁的日記中，該日記據傳位於腓尼基城市加迪爾。踏上穿越地中海西部的旅程，包括塔耳塔洛斯競技場，進行史詩般的戰鬥！

+ 經過全面技術修改的《泰坦之旅》實施了所有的重要更新，以賦予這部經典之作最佳的遊戲體驗！

在永恆餘燼DLC可在應用內購買的 中殺死巨巫泰肯之後，英雄受到傳說中的堯帝召喚，回到東方著手對付一直肆虐 這片大陸的邪魔威脅。 在追查過程中，英雄和他的同伴們發現，遠古兇獸窮奇的現身並非只是巧合，必定有兇險萬分的陰謀正在醞釀…

*在玩《Subnautica》之前，記得先確認你的裝置是否支援！*

《Subnautica》是一款設定在外星海洋星球上的水下冒險遊戲。這個龐大又充滿驚奇和危險的開放世界，等你來探索！

潛入深海、製作裝備、駕駛潛艇，並巧妙應對野生生物，探索茂密的珊瑚礁、火山、洞穴系統等多樣環境——同時努力生存下去。揭開這個充滿生物世界的神祕面紗，這些生物有的親近友好，有的則充滿敵意，且到處散落著過去的線索。

在生存模式下挑戰自我，或切換到自由模式或創意模式，無需擔心水、食物或氧氣的壓力，輕鬆探索這顆海洋星球。

特色
• 求生——在廣大的水下星球迫降後，時間緊迫，必須尋找水和食物，並開發裝備來探索這個世界。
• 探索——在潛入高聳的海帶森林、陽光照耀的高原、生物發光的珊瑚礁和蜿蜒的洞穴系統時，管理你的飢餓、口渴和氧氣供應。
• 搜刮——收集周圍海洋中的資源。深入探險以找到更稀有的資源，讓你能夠製作更先進的物品。
• 製作——建造基地供你避難，製造載具供你駕駛，製作生存工具幫助你在這個水下世界中導航和適應。
• 發現——這個星球發生了什麼事？是什麼導致你墜毀？你能找到方法活著離開這個星球嗎？
• 自訂——在生存模式下挑戰自我，或切換到自由模式或創意模式，無需擔心水、食物或氧氣的壓力，輕鬆探索這顆海洋星球。

us.description:
“Pasha Planet: Reborn” is the debut game of Scorpio Game, a Taiwanese independent game development studio. Prepare to be charmed by unique hand-painted scenes and have fun with light detective work, players will get to explore the main game plot that revolves around the characters’ daily life through an immersive and one-of-a-kind puzzle-solving gameplay.

[Game Overview]
 The story takes place on the distant planet of Pasha. A prosperous underground city, which are inhabited by adorable doggies, can be found there. They live in peace day after day, enjoying the convenience brought about by technology. However, the protagonist Bobbie, who grew up in the city, often fantasizes about getting out of the closed-off Underground City to see the world outside. This is where the main story line of the game begins. Players will take on the role of Bobbie and explore the seemingly calm and peaceful city, which is in actual fact, facing an energy crisis. Players must clear stages of challenges to solve the final mystery and figure out a way to save all the inhabitants before disaster strikes!

[Game Features]
- Created by an independent game development studio in Taiwan.
- Classic click-and-point puzzle-solving gameplay.
- Charming and heartwarming hand-painted scenes.
- Challenging puzzles and stages.

Craft your perfect defense from a combination of powerful Monkey Towers and awesome Heroes, then pop every last invading Bloon!

Over a decade of tower defense pedigree and regular massive updates makes Bloons TD 6 a favorite game for millions of players. Enjoy endless hours of strategy gaming with Bloons TD 6!

HUGE CONTENT!
* Regular updates! We release several updates every year with new characters, features, and gameplay.

* Odysseys! Battle through a series of maps connected by their theme, rules, and rewards.

ENDLESS AWESOMENESS!

us.description:
Wall of Insanity is a new project from the creators of the Slaughter game series.
It features a dark storyline, intense action, and a mystical journey into a dead, smoldering world.
You will face the unknown. A descent into a kingdom of anxiety and madness. The path through the abyss will be difficult, the trek extremely dangerous, and you will be left almost hopeless.


Story:

A police operation to detain a dangerous cult's sectarians leads to unexpectedly deadly consequences. That squad vanished under mysterious circumstances, and the Special Unit soldiers sent in to investigate their disappearance find just an empty, abandoned house. This is only where the story begins...



Key Features:

- Active battles with the use of firearms. Survival depends on caution, reaction speed, and weapon accuracy. Use elements of the environment itself to escape this horrific world.

- A journey to another world where fear, sorrow, and madness rule. A diligently crafted, ominous environment, fraught with mystery and danger, lies ahead of you. How far will you dare to go?

- A plethora of traps and enemies await around every corner. Investigate your surroundings carefully. Don't take unnecessary risks. Study your enemies. Carefully selected tactics will save your ammunition.  And your life.

- Explore the world to replenish and expand your arsenal. Weapons and useful items will be needed.  Look for secrets, documents, and workarounds to prevail against all odds.

- Wall of Insanity features simple controls, gamepad support, good optimization, and a wide graphics customization.

√ Carpenter's level
√ Supports iPhone and iPad

Level. URL scheme is "EWBubbleLevel://"

us.description:
Cyber Manhunt is a Cyber-Style, Realistic- Society theme, Story-Rich indie game. The game taked place in the Republic of Alivia with some different theme stories ,but the fate of the characters is closely related in there. It will focus on social issues liking big data, hacking, citizen privacy etc... 

We want to reveal the profound themes behind the stories with wonderful plots and gamification. And let players pay more attention to Cyber Violence and Privacy Breaches.

[Contents]
◆Chapter I: Death of a Programmer
The CEO of a company committed suicide by jumping off a building, and claimed that he was extorted tens of millions by his wife. While his wife posted photos of domestic violence on social networks. Who is lying?
◆Chapter II: Invisible Eyes
The indecent video of the female college student went viral on the Internet. At this moment, she was already socially dead. Who is the initiator? Who should protect the safety of women?
◆Chapter III: The Evidence Vanishes
The student council president, who is both excellent in character and study, suddenly disappeared. The bullying incident made the case more complicated. Who is the murderer and who is the victim?
◆Chapter IV: The Price of Humiliation
The female singer has been exposed again! Threatening letters, hype, the suicide of former girl group members... The Internet has set off a public opinion carnival again!
◆Chapter V: Immortal Code
When the society is in madness, are you willing to join the Immortal Code to obtain true love and immortality?
◆DLC: Home Sweet Home
Behind this seemingly sweet and happy family, everyone has their own secrets, what is the truth hidden behind?!
◆DLC: Hello World!
Senior researcher of Titan Dr. Lucrezia died in a terrible car accident on the spot, but the fellow Benjamin took escape from death. But he did not realize that he was about to be involved in a huge conspiracy…

[Features]
◆Highly Immersive: Gamers play as a hacker in the game, accepts the commission of the company, and solve dangerous incidents.
◆Rich Gameplay: There are lots of features of Social Engineering in the game, which is including Detecting, Tracking, Puzzles-Solving, Destroying and Hacking etc..
◆Wonderful Plots: Each chapter in the game will reflect a current hot social topic, such as: Sneak Shot, Cyber Violence, School Bullying, etc...
◆Multiple Roles: There are many different roles in this game with a flash of personality. Their stories would be dug by yourself.
◆Fully Dubbing: All the characters in the game have their own voice actors that make the game experience more immersive.
◆Original Music: There are some original songs in the game, and the lyrics and vocals are all completed by the studio.

[Gameplay]
◆Web Search: You should collect basic information about the targets through the Internet search.
◆Database: You can use the database to get deep information about targets.
◆Crack: You would get passwords based on the obtained target's information, and use it to log in to accounts of different platforms.
◆Chat: The exciting thing is that you need to chat with targets by disguise and use the information to get the trust of the target.
◆Phishing: You can send phishing links to hack the targets' hardware devices, and get private information.
◆Picture Analysis: You can get valuable information and relevant clues from pictures.
More advanced hacking methods will be unlocked later!

Lead the fiercest combat corps across the galaxy. Fight side by side with the Federation’s toughest Marines!

Now you can combine your squad and take advantage of each Unit’s unique fighting skills: from rangers to snipers, mechas, missile launchers, or fearsome alien warrior clans.

Train jaw-dropping heroes and their useful abilities: from boosting up your army’s morale and firepower to increase their stamina and reach, or detecting upcoming enemies before they attack you. Help them join the fight to keep peace among the worlds!

Become an expert on the galaxy’s biggest mysteries!

Use an in-game Encyclopedia to understand the worlds you explore or identify the enemies you face. Take advantage of the tactical info available to configure your strategic game plan.

Check all the amazing features of this real-time strategy space odyssey:

Prove yourself in daily challenges and collect amazing rewards.

Play rts games offline: Enjoy the awesome real-time strategy experience anywhere, as you explore incredible worlds.

us.description:
Titan Quest has captivated legions of players since its 2006 debut. You get the all-encompassing experience of an unbridled, truly heroic journey through the worlds of Titan Quest!

Your honorable quest is to save the world!

The gods alone cannot defeat the Titans, so real heroes are needed - and that can only be you! Your success or failure will decide the fate of the people and the Olympians! With your custom-created hero, scour the mystical and ancient worlds of Greece, Egypt, Babylon, and China. Conquer the hordes of legendary creatures and master various weapons and martial arts: Archery, sword fighting, or the use of powerful magic!

Travel a world of antiquity and Nordic mythology!

Battle the beasts of mythology as you travel to the Parthenon, the Great Pyramids, the Hanging Gardens of Babylon, the Great Wall, the Tartarus Arena, and other famous places. Encounter the greatest villains of Greek mythology, discover the uncharted lands of northern Europe, search for the mythical kingdom of Atlantis, and set out on a journey across the western Mediterranean.

It’s all or nothing on your glorious path!

With each challenge that awaits you, you'll have to defeat bigger and stronger enemies until you reach your goal and force the Titans to their knees! Rush into battle alongside brave pet companions! Find extraordinary items with special powers that will enhance your abilities and help you on your path. Legendary swords, powerful lightning spells, magical, bows and numerous other treasures with unimaginable powers await you - all of them are at your disposal in your battles and spread fear and terror among the hideous creatures!

What are you waiting for?

Like no other game in the Action RPG genre, Titan Quest: Legendary Edition combines the fascinating world of mythology with endless and exciting action that you would expect from such a compelling game!

Features:
+ Within the world of the Immortal Throne DLC, you’ll encounter the greatest villains of Greek mythology, brave the attacks of Cerberus, and hazard the banks of the River Styx. You have to interpret the prophecies of the blind seer Tiresias, fight alongside Agamemnon and Achilles, and use the wiles of Odysseus to conquer this dark new adventure.

+ In the uncharted lands of northern Europe in the Ragnarök DLC, you’ll brave the realms of the Celts, the Northmen, and the Asgardian gods!

+ Meet an explorer in the Atlantis DLC, in search of the mythical kingdom of Atlantis. A key is supposedly hidden in the diary of Herakles, which is rumored to be located in the Phoenician City of Gadir. Set out on a journey across the western Mediterranean, including the Tartarus Arena for epic battles!

+ All important updates have been implemented to the technically overhauled Titan Quest to grant the best gaming experience of this classic ever!

+ ETERNAL EMBERS DLCs available as in-app purchase - Summoned by the legendary Emperor Yao, the Hero is called back into the East to deal with a demonic threat that has been ravaging the land after the Telkine was slain.

! A note for all players who own the base version of Titan Quest: The DLCs mentioned here are also available for purchase as additional content so that all fans can upgrade their game to fully enjoy all expansions!

*Make sure to check if your device is supported before playing Subnautica!*

Subnautica is an underwater adventure game set on an alien ocean planet. A massive, open world full of wonder and peril awaits you!

Descend into the depths, craft equipment, pilot submarines and out-smart wildlife to explore lush coral reefs, volcanoes, cave systems, and more - all while trying to survive. Unravel the mystery of this world teeming with creatures, both friendly and hostile, scattered with clues from a previous time.

Play in Survival mode to experience the original challenge, or switch to Freedom or Creative mode to discover this oceanic planet without the pressures of thirst, hunger, or oxygen. 

FEATURES
• SURVIVE - After crash landing on a vast underwater planet, the clock is ticking to find water, food, and to develop the equipment you need to explore.
• EXPLORE - Manage your hunger, thirst, and oxygen supply as you dive into towering kelp forests, sunlit plateaus, bio-luminescent reefs, and winding cave systems.
• SCAVENGE - Collect resources from the ocean around you. Venture deeper and further to find rarer resources, allowing you to craft more advanced items.
• CRAFT - Build bases to shelter in, vehicles to pilot, tools for survival to aid you in navigating and adapting to this subaquatic landscape. 
• DISCOVER - What happened to this planet? What caused you to crash? Can you find a way to make it off the planet alive?
• CUSTOMIZE - Play in Survival mode to experience the original challenge, or switch to Freedom or Creative mode to discover this oceanic planet without the pressures of thirst, hunger, or oxygen.

tr.description:
“Pasha Planet: Reborn” is the debut game of Scorpio Game, a Taiwanese independent game development studio. Prepare to be charmed by unique hand-painted scenes and have fun with light detective work, players will get to explore the main game plot that revolves around the characters’ daily life through an immersive and one-of-a-kind puzzle-solving gameplay.

[Game Overview]
 The story takes place on the distant planet of Pasha. A prosperous underground city, which are inhabited by adorable doggies, can be found there. They live in peace day after day, enjoying the convenience brought about by technology. However, the protagonist Bobbie, who grew up in the city, often fantasizes about getting out of the closed-off Underground City to see the world outside. This is where the main story line of the game begins. Players will take on the role of Bobbie and explore the seemingly calm and peaceful city, which is in actual fact, facing an energy crisis. Players must clear stages of challenges to solve the final mystery and figure out a way to save all the inhabitants before disaster strikes!

[Game Features]
- Created by an independent game development studio in Taiwan.
- Classic click-and-point puzzle-solving gameplay.
- Charming and heartwarming hand-painted scenes.
- Challenging puzzles and stages.

tr.description:
Wall of Insanity is a new project from the creators of the Slaughter game series.
It features a dark storyline, intense action, and a mystical journey into a dead, smoldering world.
You will face the unknown. A descent into a kingdom of anxiety and madness. The path through the abyss will be difficult, the trek extremely dangerous, and you will be left almost hopeless.


Story:

A police operation to detain a dangerous cult's sectarians leads to unexpectedly deadly consequences. That squad vanished under mysterious circumstances, and the Special Unit soldiers sent in to investigate their disappearance find just an empty, abandoned house. This is only where the story begins...



Key Features:

- Active battles with the use of firearms. Survival depends on caution, reaction speed, and weapon accuracy. Use elements of the environment itself to escape this horrific world.

- A journey to another world where fear, sorrow, and madness rule. A diligently crafted, ominous environment, fraught with mystery and danger, lies ahead of you. How far will you dare to go?

- A plethora of traps and enemies await around every corner. Investigate your surroundings carefully. Don't take unnecessary risks. Study your enemies. Carefully selected tactics will save your ammunition.  And your life.

- Explore the world to replenish and expand your arsenal. Weapons and useful items will be needed.  Look for secrets, documents, and workarounds to prevail against all odds.

- Wall of Insanity features simple controls, gamepad support, good optimization, and a wide graphics customization.

tr.description:
Cyber Manhunt is a Cyber-Style, Realistic- Society theme, Story-Rich indie game. The game taked place in the Republic of Alivia with some different theme stories ,but the fate of the characters is closely related in there. It will focus on social issues liking big data, hacking, citizen privacy etc... 

We want to reveal the profound themes behind the stories with wonderful plots and gamification. And let players pay more attention to Cyber Violence and Privacy Breaches.

[Contents]
◆Chapter I: Death of a Programmer
The CEO of a company committed suicide by jumping off a building, and claimed that he was extorted tens of millions by his wife. While his wife posted photos of domestic violence on social networks. Who is lying?
◆Chapter II: Invisible Eyes
The indecent video of the female college student went viral on the Internet. At this moment, she was already socially dead. Who is the initiator? Who should protect the safety of women?
◆Chapter III: The Evidence Vanishes
The student council president, who is both excellent in character and study, suddenly disappeared. The bullying incident made the case more complicated. Who is the murderer and who is the victim?
◆Chapter IV: The Price of Humiliation
The female singer has been exposed again! Threatening letters, hype, the suicide of former girl group members... The Internet has set off a public opinion carnival again!
◆Chapter V: Immortal Code
When the society is in madness, are you willing to join the Immortal Code to obtain true love and immortality?
◆DLC: Home Sweet Home
Behind this seemingly sweet and happy family, everyone has their own secrets, what is the truth hidden behind?!
◆DLC: Hello World!
Senior researcher of Titan Dr. Lucrezia died in a terrible car accident on the spot, but the fellow Benjamin took escape from death. But he did not realize that he was about to be involved in a huge conspiracy…

[Features]
◆Highly Immersive: Gamers play as a hacker in the game, accepts the commission of the company, and solve dangerous incidents.
◆Rich Gameplay: There are lots of features of Social Engineering in the game, which is including Detecting, Tracking, Puzzles-Solving, Destroying and Hacking etc..
◆Wonderful Plots: Each chapter in the game will reflect a current hot social topic, such as: Sneak Shot, Cyber Violence, School Bullying, etc...
◆Multiple Roles: There are many different roles in this game with a flash of personality. Their stories would be dug by yourself.
◆Fully Dubbing: All the characters in the game have their own voice actors that make the game experience more immersive.
◆Original Music: There are some original songs in the game, and the lyrics and vocals are all completed by the studio.

[Gameplay]
◆Web Search: You should collect basic information about the targets through the Internet search.
◆Database: You can use the database to get deep information about targets.
◆Crack: You would get passwords based on the obtained target's information, and use it to log in to accounts of different platforms.
◆Chat: The exciting thing is that you need to chat with targets by disguise and use the information to get the trust of the target.
◆Phishing: You can send phishing links to hack the targets' hardware devices, and get private information.
◆Picture Analysis: You can get valuable information and relevant clues from pictures.
More advanced hacking methods will be unlocked later!

Command the Federation’s troops across the galaxy, with the aid of Heroes & Units that will allow you to boost your RTS game skills to the limit.

For all Iron Marines & SciFi action fans who get the kicks of offline RTS games and strategy games. Become the tactical specialist you’re meant to be by leading your own army in thrilling, mind-blowing missions.

The invasion is at our gates!

Lead the fiercest combat corps across the galaxy. Fight side by side with the Federation’s toughest Marines!
Now you can combine your squad and take advantage of each Unit’s unique fighting skills: from ranger to snipers, mechas, missile launchers, or fearsome alien warrior clans.
Train jaw-dropping heroes and their useful abilities: from boosting up your army’s morale and firepower to increase their stamina and reach, or detecting upcoming enemies before they attack you. Help them join the fight to keep peace among the worlds!

Become an expert on the galaxy’s biggest mysteries!
Use an in-game Encyclopedia to understand the worlds you explore or identify the enemies you face. Take advantage of the tactical info available to configure your strategic game plan.


Check all the amazing features of this real-time strategy space odyssey:
- An entire galaxy to be discovered.
- 25+ campaign missions that will take you to the most incredible worlds. Tons of planets for you to explore and defend by planning a tight strategic game plan!
- 75+ special operations for you to upgrade your Marine abilities to the peak level.
- 10 Unit groups for a total of 24 different troops. You can even combine your backup depending on the mission and strategy you’re planning to deploy.
- 9 powerful heroes with strong skills for you to train. Help them become the Galaxy’s finest!
- 8 Special Weapons to boost your army tactics to the stars! Set your game plan and take advantage of instant weapons like bouncers, toxic bombs, or even drone factories.
- 40 Upgrades to improve your strategy and empower your units with defense drones, napalm rockets, ricocheting blasts and much more.
- 20+ Achievements to show how much of a real-time strategy expert you’ve become!
- Choose your difficulty mode for the best RTS games experience: Casual, Normal, or Veteran. And if you think you’ve seen it all across the galaxy… the impossible mode - only for the elite players, available offline!
- Prove yourself in daily challenges and collect amazing rewards.
- Play rts games offline: Enjoy the awesome real-time strategy experience anywhere, as you explore incredible worlds.

Iron Marines Invasion will give you hours of colorful, fun gameplay in this epic real-time strategy space odyssey, available to play offline.

tr.description:
Titan Quest has captivated legions of players since its 2006 debut. You get the all-encompassing experience of an unbridled, truly heroic journey through the worlds of Titan Quest!

Your honorable quest is to save the world!

The gods alone cannot defeat the Titans, so real heroes are needed - and that can only be you! Your success or failure will decide the fate of the people and the Olympians! With your custom-created hero, scour the mystical and ancient worlds of Greece, Egypt, Babylon, and China. Conquer the hordes of legendary creatures and master various weapons and martial arts: Archery, sword fighting, or the use of powerful magic!

Travel a world of antiquity and Nordic mythology!

Battle the beasts of mythology as you travel to the Parthenon, the Great Pyramids, the Hanging Gardens of Babylon, the Great Wall, the Tartarus Arena, and other famous places. Encounter the greatest villains of Greek mythology, discover the uncharted lands of northern Europe, search for the mythical kingdom of Atlantis, and set out on a journey across the western Mediterranean.

It’s all or nothing on your glorious path!

With each challenge that awaits you, you'll have to defeat bigger and stronger enemies until you reach your goal and force the Titans to their knees! Rush into battle alongside brave pet companions! Find extraordinary items with special powers that will enhance your abilities and help you on your path. Legendary swords, powerful lightning spells, magical, bows and numerous other treasures with unimaginable powers await you - all of them are at your disposal in your battles and spread fear and terror among the hideous creatures!

What are you waiting for?

Like no other game in the Action RPG genre, Titan Quest: Legendary Edition combines the fascinating world of mythology with endless and exciting action that you would expect from such a compelling game!

Features:
+ Within the world of the Immortal Throne DLC, you’ll encounter the greatest villains of Greek mythology, brave the attacks of Cerberus, and hazard the banks of the River Styx. You have to interpret the prophecies of the blind seer Tiresias, fight alongside Agamemnon and Achilles, and use the wiles of Odysseus to conquer this dark new adventure.

+ In the uncharted lands of northern Europe in the Ragnarök DLC, you’ll brave the realms of the Celts, the Northmen, and the Asgardian gods!

+ Meet an explorer in the Atlantis DLC, in search of the mythical kingdom of Atlantis. A key is supposedly hidden in the diary of Herakles, which is rumored to be located in the Phoenician City of Gadir. Set out on a journey across the western Mediterranean, including the Tartarus Arena for epic battles!

+ All important updates have been implemented to the technically overhauled Titan Quest to grant the best gaming experience of this classic ever!

+ ETERNAL EMBERS DLCs available as in-app purchase - Summoned by the legendary Emperor Yao, the Hero is called back into the East to deal with a demonic threat that has been ravaging the land after the Telkine was slain.

! A note for all players who own the base version of Titan Quest: The DLCs mentioned here are also available for purchase as additional content so that all fans can upgrade their game to fully enjoy all expansions!

© www.handy-games.com GmbH

*Make sure to check if your device is supported before playing Subnautica!*

Subnautica is an underwater adventure game set on an alien ocean planet. A massive, open world full of wonder and peril awaits you!

Descend into the depths, craft equipment, pilot submarines and out-smart wildlife to explore lush coral reefs, volcanoes, cave systems, and more - all while trying to survive. Unravel the mystery of this world teeming with creatures, both friendly and hostile, scattered with clues from a previous time.

Play in Survival mode to experience the original challenge, or switch to Freedom or Creative mode to discover this oceanic planet without the pressures of thirst, hunger, or oxygen. 

FEATURES
• SURVIVE - After crash landing on a vast underwater planet, the clock is ticking to find water, food, and to develop the equipment you need to explore.
• EXPLORE - Manage your hunger, thirst, and oxygen supply as you dive into towering kelp forests, sunlit plateaus, bio-luminescent reefs, and winding cave systems.
• SCAVENGE - Collect resources from the ocean around you. Venture deeper and further to find rarer resources, allowing you to craft more advanced items.
• CRAFT - Build bases to shelter in, vehicles to pilot, tools for survival to aid you in navigating and adapting to this subaquatic landscape. 
• DISCOVER - What happened to this planet? What caused you to crash? Can you find a way to make it off the planet alive?
• CUSTOMIZE - Play in Survival mode to experience the original challenge, or switch to Freedom or Creative mode to discover this oceanic planet without the pressures of thirst, hunger, or oxygen.

pt.description:
“Pasha Planet: Reborn” is the debut game of Scorpio Game, a Taiwanese independent game development studio. Prepare to be charmed by unique hand-painted scenes and have fun with light detective work, players will get to explore the main game plot that revolves around the characters’ daily life through an immersive and one-of-a-kind puzzle-solving gameplay.

[Game Overview]
 The story takes place on the distant planet of Pasha. A prosperous underground city, which are inhabited by adorable doggies, can be found there. They live in peace day after day, enjoying the convenience brought about by technology. However, the protagonist Bobbie, who grew up in the city, often fantasizes about getting out of the closed-off Underground City to see the world outside. This is where the main story line of the game begins. Players will take on the role of Bobbie and explore the seemingly calm and peaceful city, which is in actual fact, facing an energy crisis. Players must clear stages of challenges to solve the final mystery and figure out a way to save all the inhabitants before disaster strikes!

[Game Features]
- Created by an independent game development studio in Taiwan.
- Classic click-and-point puzzle-solving gameplay.
- Charming and heartwarming hand-painted scenes.
- Challenging puzzles and stages.

pt.description:
Cyber Manhunt is a Cyber-Style, Realistic- Society theme, Story-Rich indie game. The game taked place in the Republic of Alivia with some different theme stories ,but the fate of the characters is closely related in there. It will focus on social issues liking big data, hacking, citizen privacy etc... 

We want to reveal the profound themes behind the stories with wonderful plots and gamification. And let players pay more attention to Cyber Violence and Privacy Breaches.

[Contents]
◆Chapter I: Death of a Programmer
The CEO of a company committed suicide by jumping off a building, and claimed that he was extorted tens of millions by his wife. While his wife posted photos of domestic violence on social networks. Who is lying?
◆Chapter II: Invisible Eyes
The indecent video of the female college student went viral on the Internet. At this moment, she was already socially dead. Who is the initiator? Who should protect the safety of women?
◆Chapter III: The Evidence Vanishes
The student council president, who is both excellent in character and study, suddenly disappeared. The bullying incident made the case more complicated. Who is the murderer and who is the victim?
◆Chapter IV: The Price of Humiliation
The female singer has been exposed again! Threatening letters, hype, the suicide of former girl group members... The Internet has set off a public opinion carnival again!
◆Chapter V: Immortal Code
When the society is in madness, are you willing to join the Immortal Code to obtain true love and immortality?
◆DLC: Home Sweet Home
Behind this seemingly sweet and happy family, everyone has their own secrets, what is the truth hidden behind?!
◆DLC: Hello World!
Senior researcher of Titan Dr. Lucrezia died in a terrible car accident on the spot, but the fellow Benjamin took escape from death. But he did not realize that he was about to be involved in a huge conspiracy…

[Features]
◆Highly Immersive: Gamers play as a hacker in the game, accepts the commission of the company, and solve dangerous incidents.
◆Rich Gameplay: There are lots of features of Social Engineering in the game, which is including Detecting, Tracking, Puzzles-Solving, Destroying and Hacking etc..
◆Wonderful Plots: Each chapter in the game will reflect a current hot social topic, such as: Sneak Shot, Cyber Violence, School Bullying, etc...
◆Multiple Roles: There are many different roles in this game with a flash of personality. Their stories would be dug by yourself.
◆Fully Dubbing: All the characters in the game have their own voice actors that make the game experience more immersive.
◆Original Music: There are some original songs in the game, and the lyrics and vocals are all completed by the studio.

[Gameplay]
◆Web Search: You should collect basic information about the targets through the Internet search.
◆Database: You can use the database to get deep information about targets.
◆Crack: You would get passwords based on the obtained target's information, and use it to log in to accounts of different platforms.
◆Chat: The exciting thing is that you need to chat with targets by disguise and use the information to get the trust of the target.
◆Phishing: You can send phishing links to hack the targets' hardware devices, and get private information.
◆Picture Analysis: You can get valuable information and relevant clues from pictures.
More advanced hacking methods will be unlocked later!

pt.description:
Descubra e conquiste incontáveis ​​mundos no espaço profundo. Desvende uma história cheia de desafios e ameaças que o levarão pela galáxia em uma viagem extraordinária. 

Nada dura muito no espaço profundo, e a paz não é uma exceção!
Bem-vindo ao Iron Marines Invasion!

Aproveite missões de fase única e operações especiais em novos mundos emocionantes, cada um com seu próprio terreno, estilo, inimigos e condições particulares. Saiba como vencê-los um por um!

Comande as tropas da Federação em toda a galáxia, com a ajuda de Heróis e Unidades que levarão suas habilidades em RTS ao limite.

Lute contra inimigos extraordinários e criaturas alienígenas ferozes em missões divertidas e eletrizantes. Planeje sua estratégia para defender a paz na galáxia!

Para todos os fãs de ação de Iron Marines e SciFi que gostam de jogos RTS e estratégia geral offline. Torne-se um especialista tático, liderando seu próprio exército em missões emocionantes e alucinantes.

A invasão é iminente!
Lidere o corpo de combate mais feroz da galáxia. Lute lado a lado com os fuzileiros navais mais durões da Federação!

Agora você pode combinar seu esquadrão e aproveitar as habilidades de luta únicas de cada unidade: de guardas a franco-atiradores, mechas, lançadores de mísseis ou temíveis clãs de guerreiros alienígenas.

Treine heróis de cair o queixo e suas habilidades úteis: desde aumentar a moral e o poder de fogo do seu exército até aumentar sua resistência e alcance, ou detectar inimigos próximos antes que eles ataquem você. Ajude-os a entrar na luta para manter a paz entre os mundos!

Torne-se um especialista nos maiores mistérios da galáxia!
Use uma enciclopédia de jogo para entender os mundos que você explora ou identificar os inimigos que você enfrenta. Aproveite as informações táticas disponíveis para configurar seu plano de jogo estratégico.

Confira todos os recursos incríveis desta odisseia espacial de estratégia em tempo real:
- Uma galáxia inteira a ser descoberta.
- Mais de 25 missões de campanha que o levarão aos mundos mais incríveis. Toneladas de planetas para você explorar e defender com um plano de jogo estratégico elaborado!
- 75+ operações especiais para você atualizar suas habilidades de fuzileiros ao nível máximo.
- 10 grupos de unidades chegando a um total de 24 tropas diferentes. Você pode até combinar seus reforços dependendo da missão e estratégia que planeja mobilizar.
- 9 heróis poderosos com grandes habilidades para você treinar. Ajude-os a se tornarem os melhores da galáxia!
- 8 armas especiais para impulsionar suas táticas do exército até as estrelas! Defina seu plano de jogo e aproveite as armas instantâneas, como tribombas, bombas tóxicas ou até fábricas de drones.
- 40 atualizações para melhorar sua estratégia e capacitar suas unidades com drones de defesa, foguetes de napalm, explosões de ricochete e muito mais.
- Mais de 20 conquistas para mostrar o quanto você se tornou um especialista em estratégia em tempo real!

Escolha o seu modo de dificuldade para ter a melhor experiência de jogos RTS: casual, normal ou veterano. E para quem acha que já viu de tudo nesta galáxia... o modo impossível - apenas para os jogadores de elite, disponível offline!

Teste suas habilidades em desafios diários e colete recompensas incríveis.
Jogue RTS offline: aproveite a incrível experiência de estratégia em tempo real em qualquer lugar, enquanto explora mundos incríveis.
Iron Marines Invasion oferece horas de jogabilidade colorida e divertida nesta odisseia espacial épica de estratégia em tempo real, disponível para jogar RTS offline.

pt.description:
O Titan Quest cativou legiões de jogadores desde a sua estreia em 2006. Tu recebes a experiência abrangente de uma jornada desenfreada e verdadeiramente heróica pelos mundos de Titan Quest!

A tua honrosa missão é salvar o mundo!

Sozinhos, os deuses sozinhos não conseguem derrotar os Titãs. Por isso, são necessários heróis reais - e só podes ser tu! O teu sucesso ou fracasso decidirá o destino do povo e dos Olympians! Percorre os mundos místicos e antigos da Grécia, Egito, Babilónia e China com o teu herói personalizado. Conquista as hordas de criaturas lendárias e domina várias armas e artes marciais: tiro com arco, luta de espadas ou o uso de magia poderosa!

Viaja por um mundo de antiguidade e mitologia nórdica!

Luta contra as feras da mitologia enquanto viajas para o Partenon, as Grandes Pirâmides, os Jardins Suspensos da Babilónia, a Grande Muralha, a Arena do Tártaro e outros lugares famosos. Encontra os maiores vilões da mitologia grega, descobre as terras desconhecidas do norte da Europa, procura o reino mítico da Atlântida e faz uma jornada pelo Mediterrâneo Ocidental.

É tudo ou nada no teu caminho glorioso!

A cada desafio que te espera, terás que derrotar inimigos maiores e mais fortes até atingires o teu objetivo e forçar os Titãs a ajoelharem! Corre para a batalha ao lado de bravos companheiros de estimação! Encontra itens extraordinários com poderes especiais que irão melhorar as tuas capacidades e ajudar-te no teu caminho. Espadas lendárias, feitiços de relâmpagos poderosos, magia, arcos e vários outros tesouros com poderes inimagináveis esperam por ti - todos eles estão à tua disposição nas tuas batalhas e espalham medo e terror entre as criaturas horríveis!

De que estás à espera?

Como nenhum outro jogo no género RPG de ação, o Titan Quest: Edição Lendária combina o fascinante mundo da mitologia com a ação interminável e emocionante que esperas de um jogo tão atraente!

Características principais:

- No DLC do Trono Imortal, encontrarás os maiores vilões da mitologia grega, enfrentarás os ataques de Cerberus e arriscarás as margens do Rio Styx. Deves interpretar as profecias do vidente cego Tirésias, lutar ao lado de Agamenon e Aquiles e usar os ardis de Odisseu para conquistar esta nova aventura sombria.

- Nas terras desconhecidas do norte da Europa no Ragnarök DLC, enfrentarás os reinos dos celtas, dos homens do norte e dos deuses Asgardianos!

- Conhece um explorador no DLC Atlantis, em busca do reino mítico da Atlântida. Uma chave está supostamente escondida no diário de Hércules, que dizem estar localizado na cidade fenícia de Gadir. Começa uma jornada pelo Mediterrâneo Ocidental, incluindo a Arena do Tártaro para batalhas épicas!

+ Todas as atualizações importantes foram implementadas no Titan Quest revisto tecnicamente para garantir a melhor experiência de jogo deste clássico de todos os tempos!

+ ETERNAL EMBERS DLCs disponíveis como compra in-app - Invocado pelo lendário Imperador Yao, o Herói é chamado de volta ao Leste para lidar com uma ameaça demoníaca que está devastando a terra depois que o Telkine foi morto.

+ Uma nota para todos os jogadores que possuem a versão básica do Titan Quest: Os DLCs mencionados aqui também serão lançados para compra como conteúdo adicional para que todos os fãs possam atualizar os seus jogos para desfrutarem todas as expansões!

pt.description:
*Confira se o seu dispositivo é suportado antes de jogar Subnautica!*

Subnautica é um jogo de aventura subaquática ambientado em um planeta oceânico alienígena. Um mundo aberto enorme repleto de maravilhas e perigos está à sua espera!

Mergulhe nas profundezas, fabrique equipamentos, pilote submarinos e supere a vida selvagem para explorar recifes de corais, vulcões, sistemas de cavernas e muito mais — tudo enquanto tenta sobreviver. Desvende o mistério deste mundo repleto de criaturas, tanto amigáveis quanto hostis, com pistas de uma era passada.

Jogue no modo de sobrevivência e vivencie o desafio original ou troque para o modo de liberdade ou criativo para explorar o planeta oceânico sem a pressão da sede, da fome ou do oxigênio. 

RECURSOS
• SOBREVIVA — Após cair em um vasto planeta subaquático, você corre contra o tempo para encontrar comida, água e para desenvolver os equipamentos necessários para explorar.
• EXPLORE — Gerencie fome, sede e fornecimento de oxigênio conforme mergulha nas enormes florestas de alga, nos planaltos iluminados pelo sol, nos recifes bioluminescentes e sistemas de caverna enormes.
• SUCATEIE — Colete recursos do oceano à sua volta. Aventure-se ainda mais nas profundezas para encontrar recursos mais raros, permitindo a fabricação de itens avançados.
• FABRIQUE — Crie bases para se abrigar, veículos para pilotar, ferramentas de sobrevivência para auxiliar na navegação e na adaptação a este cenário subaquático. 
• DESCUBRA — O que aconteceu com o planeta? O que causou o seu acidente? Você consegue achar uma saída deste planeta sem morrer?
• PERSONALIZE — Jogue no modo de sobrevivência e vivencie o desafio original ou troque para o modo de liberdade ou criativo para explorar o planeta oceânico sem a pressão da sede, da fome ou do oxigênio.

CUIDADOSAMENTE REPROJETADO PARA DISPOSITIVOS MÓVEIS
• Interface reformulada — IU móvel exclusiva com controle de toque completo
• Conquistas do Game Center
• Salvamento na nuvem — compartilhe o progresso entre dispositivos iOS
• Compatível com controles MFi
• Otimização para iPhone 16 (incluindo Pro Max)
